characteristics.characteristic: After this unit has declared an Attack Order, pick one enemy unit targeted by that order, that unit gains -1 evade for the rest of the turn.

(Order Phase): Pick one friendly unit within 6" of this model, return up to 1d4 lost wounds to that unit. If there were spare wounds not allocated (because the unit was at max health), also give that unit +1 order
Medium
Bludgeoning
Piercing
Flurry (7+)
Piercing
While this unit is within cover, friendly units within 6" ignore the first point of damage dealt to them during the Engage Phase
Before attacking with a Needle weapon, roll a D4, with a random effect based on the result. 1. Poison 2. Fire 3. Weakness 4. Fear
Light
(Positioning Phase): Target a friendly unit within 6" and roll a d6. If you do roll above that units Evade stat, heal that unit d4+1 OR take an Effect Token away from that unit.
Fear
Needle
Needle
This unit has the Rat keyword
This unit has the Mouse keyword
Medium

Instead of Deploying this unit, you may place up to 3 'Shadow' tokens on the Battlefield 9" outside of your opponent's deployment zone. Those Tokens are removed from the battlefield if an enemy model comes in contact with one of them.
(Order Phase): Choose a Champion model within line of sight and 6" of this unit. All attacks made by this Foxjaeger unit gain the "Champion +1 Damage" trait.

During your Positioning Phase, you may set up the Foxjaeger within base contact of one of the available 'Shadow' tokens. The Foxjaeger then gains x+2 Order Tokens, where X is the amount of Shadow Tokens removed from play during the battle
Flurry (7+)
Piercing
Flurry (7+)
Evade -1
Light
Whenever this unit is under the effect of RABIES, models in this unit have Medium armor instead of Light armor
Riposte (+1 dam)
Stun
Medium

After this unit has completed an Attack Order, select one enemy unit Infantry that was the target of this unit's shooting weapons. If this unit killed any models in the enemy unit, that unit cannot gain the benefits of cover for the rest of the Engage Phase
Piercing
Stun
Fear
Piercing
Stun
Fear
Medium
(Positioning Phase): Reduce this unit's movement by half. In addition, increase this unit's EVADE stat to 5 and Armour to Heavy for this turn
Bludgeoning
Bludgeoning
Stun
Stun
Medium

(Positioning Phase): This unit can be set up anywhere on the Battlefield up to 18" away from its current position. Before doing so, place a token in base contact to one of the models in this unit. After this unit has moved in this manner, place a second token in base contact with the unit. Then, draw a straight line connecting both tokens. For each enemy unit that line crosses, complete a free Attack Order against that unit with ONE of this unit's Seed Mines for every two models in this unit
Piercing, Payload
Flurry (7+), Payload
Stun, Subterranean
Piercing, Payload
Flurry (7+), Payload
Stun, Subterranean
Light
(Positioning Phase): Target one friendly Mammalian Borough unit within 12", that unit gains a Fear Effect Token
While a friendly unit with a Fear Effect Token is within 12" of a Nox Interrogator, gain +1 Attack characteristic to all weapons equipped by that unit
Poison (4+)
Flurry (7+)
Weakness (5+)
Flurry (7+)
Light
If an enemy unit takes damage from the Penetrating unique trait by attacks made from this unit, that enemy unit gains a Fear Effect Token if any models were slain by that damage
When this unit deals damage through Riposte, that damage is Unavoidable.
Penetrating
Flurry (7+)
Flurry (7+)
Medium
The Attacks characteristic for this unit's Melee Weapons is equal to its current Health
While this unit is within 10" of a friendly Rodent Field Surgeon, each time it heals, add 2 to the amount of Health restored
Bludgeoning
Piercing
Flurry (6+)
(Order Phase) Target a friendly unit within friendly territory. Heal that unit 1d4+1
Gain 1VP if a unit that started the turn within melee range of an enemy unit is still alive at the end of the turn.
(Engage Phase) Target a friendly unit outside of friendly territory. That unit gains +1 skill on all weapons for the rest of the turn.
Gain 1VP if a friendly unit destroyed an enemy unit within enemy territory.
(Engage Phase) Target a friendly unit within melee range of enemy models. That unit gains the Disposable keyword
Gain 1VP if at least two friendly units were destroyed outside of friendly territory

(Positioning Phase) Target a friendly Elite unit within 1" of any terrain piece that has not completed any orders this phase. That unit may be set up within 1" of another terrain piece within 6" of the target terrain piece. That friendly unit cannot make any more orders in this phase
Gain 1VP if you have at least two different Elite units controlling Core terrain pieces within different zones
Target one friendly Predator unit. That unit gains +1 to the attacks of all of its weapons if it targets the closest enemy unit.
Gain 1VP if a friendly Predator unit killed an enemy unit within Enemy territory this turn
Target one friendly Prey unit that has declared an Attack Order this turn. After resolving that Attack Order, the unit may move 1d4"
Gain 1VP if there is at least one non-Champion prey unit within 3" of any battlefield edge.
Target a friendly unit. That unit gains +1 to skill of shooting weapons when targeting an enemy unit on a higher elevation level.
Gain 1VP if a friendly unit that was the target of the "Burrowing Assault" this game destroyed an enemy unit this turn.

Target one friendly Bunny Thegn within friendly territory. After an enemy unit has been the target of its "Objective Sighted" rule, each enemy unit within 6" of that unit suffers -1 to their Evade characteristic for the rest of the turn.
Gain 1VP if a Bunny Thegn destroys an enemy Elite or Champion unit that was outside of friendly territory.

(Positioning Phase) Target one friendly Hare Huscarls unit and one Core Terrain piece within 1" of that unit. Enemy units within range of that terrain piece must resolve the effects of a Fire Token at the end of the turn
Gain 1VP if a friendly Hare Huscarl unit killed an enemy unit within range of a Core terrain piece

(Engage Phase) Target a friendly unit. Before that unit completes an Attack Order against a unit within range of its melee weapons, models in this unit may move up to 4" but must stay within range of the enemy unit's melee weapons
Gain 1VP if one or more friendly units ended the turn on top of a Heavy Terrain piece.
(Engage Phase) After declaring an Attack Order with a friendly Mammalian Borough unit, all "Quillbow" weapons equipped by that unit gain the Evade -1 trait
Gain 1VP if a friendly unit destroyed an enemy unit with attacks from a "Quillbow" weapon
Target one friendly Mammalian Boroughs unit with either a Stun or Fear token. That unit increases its armour value by one stage for the rest of the turn.

Target one friendly Mammalian Borough unit that is within range of a Core Terrain piece but not on top of that terrain piece. For the rest of the turn, enemy weapons targeting that unit must decrease their Skill by one.
Gain 1VP if you control one ore more Core Terrain pieces while not being on top of those Core Terrain pieces

(Engage Phase) Target one Terrain Feature within 1" of a friendly Mammalian Borough unit. For the rest of the turn, enemy models have their Intelligence halved while completing an Action order on this terrain feature
Gain 1VP at the end of the turn if you control more Core Terrain features within Enemy Territory than your opponent.
Target a friendly Mammalian Boroughs Rat or Mouse unit. For each point of health that unit is missing, increase the attacks characteristic of Melee weapons equipped on this unit by one.
Gain 1VP at the end of the turn if a friendly Rat or Mouse unit is below half health and still on the battlefield.

(Order Phase): Pick one friendly unit within 6" of this model, return up to 1d4 lost wounds to that unit. If there were spare wounds not allocated (because the unit was at max health), also give that unit +1 order

profile.name: I really thought they'd make it

characteristics.characteristic: Once per phase, if a friendly Infantry unit within 6" of this unit is destroyed, give this unit +1 Order. If Padfoot, Thegn of Stamford has already activated this phase, you may immediately complete that order after the current unit has completed their activation.
Medium
Bludgeoning
Piercing
Shooting weapons equipped by this Champion increase their range by 6”
This Champion increases the range of all its Critter Card abilities by 3"
Once per game in the Order Phase, target a friendly unit within 6”, heal that unit 1d4+1.
Improve this Champion's Armour by one step.
Shooting weapons equipped by this Champion gain the “Stun” keyword
Once per game, target an enemy Champion within line of sight. Gain +1 Damage to melee weapons equipped by this Champion that target that enemy Champion
Shooting weapons equipped by this Champion increase their range by 6”

Once per game, after drawing your Secondary Mission cards for the turn, you may look at the top card of the Secondary Mission deck. You may choose to replace a card within your hand with that top card, and if so, shuffle the replaced card back into the Secondary Mission deck.
The first time this Champion dies, do not remove it from the battlefield. At the end of the turn, heal this unit 1.
This unit gains “Riposte +1 dam” on all Melee weapons
Once per game, this Champion may complete an Order for free

This unit gains the following Active Order: Prey’s Duty [1] (Order Phase): Deal 2 Unavoidable damage to a friendly Prey unit within 6”, and then target one Predator unit within 6”. For the rest of the turn, that Predator unit gains a +1 bonus to its weapons Attacks characteristic, as if it were under the effect of the Bloodstained rule.
